The challenge type is Information Asymmetry in Multi-Dimensional Contract Design for Metaverse Ecosystems. It involves addressing adverse selection problems arising from unknown private information (e.g., semantic extraction ability, transmission rate, refresh rate of IoT devices; valuation preferences of Metaverse users) and designing incentive mechanisms to ensure truth-telling while maximizing the virtual service provider's (VSP) profit with minimal Individual Rationality (IR) and Incentive Compatibility (IC) violations.
